creator: noses@oink.rhein.de
text:
As soon as the machine is in mutiuser mode only one of the n 3C505 in my
systems is working any more, the rest is deaf and mute. Strangely enough
they ARE working while sinlge user if ifconfiged but stop doing so when
routes are added. One stays functional.

Fix: 

Remove n-1 3C505 or find the one that is working and ignore the
	rest.
How-To-Repeat: see description
